name: msmodelslim
description: Model quantization on Ascend NPUs using msmodelslim. End-to-end workflow: quantize → serve → evaluate → analyze. Covers W4A8/W8A8/W4A4 quantization, YAML config authoring, mixed precision for MoE/VLM, sensitive layer analysis, vLLM Ascend serving, and AISBench evaluation.
author: starmountain1997
